# Return Window

Most products can be sent back within thirty days of delivery for a complete refund, provided the item is unused, kept in its original packaging, and presented with the original receipt or order confirmation. Requests made after the thirty-day period are reviewed individually and may be resolved with store credit rather than a cash refund.

[Source: returns_policy.md#return-window]
